page_metadata.biotools__summary: Co-expression analysis for expression profiles arising from high-throughput sequencing data. Feature profiles are clustered using adapted transformations and mixture models or a K-means algorithm, and model selection criteria are provided.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Co-expression analysis for expression profiles arising from high-throughput sequencing data. Feature profiles are clustered using adapted transformations and mixture models or a K-means algorithm, and model selection criteria are provided.
